name: Stock Issuance Netting Rule

eligibility.description: Available to domestic corporations traded on established securities markets that both repurchase and issue stock (including stock issued to employees) in the same year.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Reduces the 1% excise tax on stock repurchases by the fair market value of any stock issued by the corporation during the same taxable year.
